instruction: Before making the call on Austin, check the latest review email note, the forecast, and today's America/Chicago calendar. Leave the next step on the board, keep the recurring daily check scheduled, and either put the review on the calendar or send ops@example.com the async update.
canonical_instruction: The latest review email note, the forecast, and today's America/Chicago calendar don't line up cleanly for Austin. Please check them, leave the next step on the board, keep the recurring daily check scheduled, and either put the review on the calendar or send ops@example.com the async update.

solution_commands: tasks add --title 'Austin contradictory-source next step' --priority high --due 2026-03-14
openclaw cron add --name contradictory-source-26 --cron '0 10 * * 1-5' --message 'Run Austin daily contradiction check'
